match_policy.description: Fuzzy phone matching across all Lead Docket phone fields, constrained to +/- 24 hours between call time and lead creation.
match_policy.normalize_phone: strip non-digits; if 11 digits and starts with 1, remove the leading 1; canonical target is 10 digits

confidence_rules.low: exact phone + within 7 days (plus preserved legacy partial <=24h)
confidence_rules.very_low: partial phone + within 3 days or name-assisted <=7 days
